faqs.question: Can I use AI to rewrite turning video transcripts into useful email newsletter drafts without changing the meaning?
faqs.answer: Yes, but you need to keep the original message in view. Descript is the best first pass when you want careful wording, Grammarly is useful when you need a different rewrite style, and Notion AI is the fallback for a final polish.

faqs.question: Which AI tool is better for tone and clarity?
faqs.answer: Descript is usually the safest place to start when you want cleaner tone without losing intent. Grammarly becomes more useful when you need a more opinionated rewrite.

faqs.question: Is Descript better than Grammarly for client emails?
faqs.answer: Descript is better when accuracy and tone control matter more than speed; Grammarly is the better fallback when you want a wider rewrite or a second opinion on wording.

faqs.question: What should I avoid before I send the final version?
faqs.answer: Do not send the rewritten text until you have checked the meaning, names, dates, and asks. That matters even more when you use Notion AI for the final edit.
